---
title: "Results"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(readr); library(knitr)
})
gen <- "_generated"
pooled  <- read_csv(file.path(gen, "pooled_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sub     <- tryCatch(read_csv(file.path(gen, "subgroup_summary.csv"),
                             show_col_types = FALSE),
                    error = function(e) tibble())
subset  <- tryCatch(read_csv(file.path(gen, "subset_summary.csv"),
                             show_col_types = FALSE),
                    error = function(e) tibble())
bias    <- tryCatch(read_csv(file.path(gen, "publication_bias.csv"),
                             show_col_types = FALSE),
                    error = function(e) tibble())
l1o     <- tryCatch(read_csv(file.path(gen, "leave1out.csv"),
                             show_col_types = FALSE),
                    error = function(e) tibble())
```

## Pooled effects

```{r}
#| echo: false
pooled |>
  mutate(across(c(pooled_OR, ci_lo, ci_hi, pi_lo, pi_hi),
                ~ sprintf("%.2f", .))) |>
  kable()
```

## Subgroup analyses

```{r}
#| echo: false
if (nrow(sub)) kable(sub) else cat("Subgroup models not yet runnable.")
```

## Sensitivity (subset re-fits)

```{r}
#| echo: false
if (nrow(subset)) {
  subset |>
    mutate(across(c(pooled_OR, ci_lo, ci_hi),
                  ~ sprintf("%.2f", .))) |>
    kable()
} else {
  cat("Subset analyses not yet runnable.")
}
```

## Leave-one-out (depression only, illustrative)

```{r}
#| echo: false
if (nrow(l1o)) {
  l1o |>
    filter(outcome == "depression") |>
    mutate(across(c(pooled_OR, ci_lo, ci_hi, I2),
                  ~ sprintf("%.2f", .))) |>
    kable()
}
```

## Publication bias

```{r}
#| echo: false
if (nrow(bias)) kable(bias)
```

## Risk of bias summary

See `data/rob.csv` (long format) and the per-outcome breakdown in the
forthcoming `robvis` summary plot.
